name: Sn1per — automated recon & attack surface
description: Automated reconnaissance / attack-surface scan with Sn1per. The target becomes an ASSET, discovered open ports/services become CPEs linked to it, and any CVEs found become findings. Intrusive — run only against authorized targets (the engagement scope is enforced by the runner); pick the least-intrusive mode that fits your authorization. Install Sn1per on the worker (https://github.com/1N3/Sn1per) and ensure it runs non-interactively.

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Target host / domain / IP within the authorized engagement scope.
